1.content:
Milhouse comes over to hang out with Bart. So Milhouse walks up to the door and knocks on it. Marge answered the door with Maggie in her arm. "O hi Milhouse Bart isn't home and neither is Lisa, but you can stay and watch Maggie for me while I go and pick Bart and Lisa up." Milhouse then says. "Ok I'll watch Maggie for you Marge."

When all of a sudden Maggie says very cutely. "Uh-oh mommy and Milhouse! I just peed my huggies! Marge is about to say that she'll change Maggie. When Milhouse speaks up and reminds her that he's babysitting Maggie. Marge says. "I'll change" um Marge Milhouse said. "I'll change her for you because I'm her babysitter." Marge then says. "O thanks Milhouse." She then says. "Ok you two have fun and Maggie don't be a Bart for Milhouse." Maggie says. "Don't worry mommy I'm not going to be a Bart. In fact I'm going to be a Lisa after Milhouse changes me."

So with that said Marge kisses Maggie on the cheek and walks out the door. So as Marge pulls out of the driveway. Milhouse takes Maggie up to her room to get her wet diaper changed. Once in Maggie's room as Milhouse is getting everything needed and ready to change Maggie's wet diaper. Milhouse then asks Maggie. "Hey Maggie what did your mom mean by don't be a Bart, and you said that you're not going to be a Bart but instead a Lisa?" Maggie answers Milhouse saying. "O that's mom's way of telling me to not to behave have like Bart for my babysitter." Milhouse says. "Ok that makes sense Maggie, and I'm going to guess that when you're going to be a Lisa. You meant you're going to behave like Lisa and be a good girl for your babysitter." Maggie says. "Yes that's exactly it Milhouse, and do you need help." Milhouse thinks it over before saying. "Um I might need some help Maggie." What did Milhouse need help with?
1.title: Milhouse is asked to babysit Maggie

choices: Yes
No
Calls Marge and asks her if it's ok
Call Marge and has Maggie ask her mom if it's ok
11.content: Milhouse says. "Um Maggie I already need your help getting your onesie open." Maggie slowly opens her onesie as she shows Milhouse where the buttons are on her onesie. Milhouse says. "Thank you Maggie." He then untapes her wet diaper and opens it. As he wipes her clean she says. "I can get out Lisa's toddler clothes, huggies pull ups, and potty, and you can have me put a huggies pull up and one of Lisa's toddler outfits and teach me how to use the potty." Does Milhouse agree to letting Maggie get Lisa's toddler stuff out?

choices: Yes

Maggie slowly opens her huggies as she shows Milhouse where the tabs are on her huggies. Milhouse says. "Thank you Maggie." He then gets out the wipes and start wiping her. As he wipes her clean she says. "I can get out Lisa's toddler clothes, huggies pull ups, and potty, and you can have me put a huggies pull up and one of Lisa's toddler outfits and teach me how to use the potty." Does Milhouse agree to letting Maggie get Lisa's toddler stuff out?
12.title: Getting her huggies open

choices: Her bottom
Her wee wee
13.content: So after Milhouse finally gets her onesie and huggies open he says. "Um Maggie can you teach me how to wipe your bottom and wee wee correctly." Maggie answers back saying. "Sure I can Milhouse." So with that said Maggie teaches Milhouse how to wipe ___ first.
13.title: Wiping her

choices: Milhouse let's her finish peeing onto the old diaper
He runs her to the toilet with her old diaper temporarily back on her
She has Milhouse get Lisa's potty out of her closet and put her on it
132.content: Maggie says as she grabs a baby wipe to demonstrate how to properly wipe her wee wee. "Ok Milhouse watch how I wipe my wee wee." So Milhouse watches Maggie wipe it from front to back. Milhouse the says. "Hey Maggie! Is there a specific reason why you wiped your wee wee from front to back and not the other way around." Maggie says. "Yes it's so if that if your wiping me after I pooped my diaper my poop wouldn't accidentally get wiped into my wee wee." Maggie says. "Ok Milhouse it your turn to wipe my wee wee." So Milhouse starts to wipe Maggie's wee wee. When all of a sudden they both say uh-oh at the same time. Milhouse says. "Uh-oh Maggie you're peeing!" Maggie says. "Uh-oh Milhouse you're right I am peeing!" What happens next?
132.title: Her wee wee

choices: No you actually put just the right amount of both unlike Bart that one time

14.content: Milhouse has surprisingly gotten pretty far in changing Maggie's huggies without her help. Milhouse says. "Um Maggie! Am I putting too much baby powder and diaper rash cream on you." What does Maggie say?
14.title: Putting the baby powder and diaper rash cream on

choices: Yes
No and he says Maggie I don't think your mom would be ok with you standing
No, Maggie says I'm not peeing until you let me pee like a boy or can't hold it
143.content: Milhouse says as he immediately picks up Maggie and runs to her to the toilet. "Maggie do you think you can hold it until you're on the toilet." Maggie goes to say something but accidentally squirts urine. "Uh-oh! Milhouse I'm sorry that I squirted urine on you." Maggie then says. "Milhouse I don't need to sit on the toilet just get the step stool ready for me." Milhouse says. "But Maggie you're a girl and girls can't aim like boys can!" Maggie says. "Well that is true but not for me, because I have been practicing going like a boy." So does Milhouse trust Maggie's word that she can pee like a boy?
143.title: Milhouse I'm about to pee and so can you ta...

choices: Diaper and onesie
Pull up and one of Lisa's toddler outfits
Have Milhouse give her a bath since it's time for her bath now
15.content: Milhouse and Maggie are shocked at how far Milhouse got without her help on how to open her onesie, open her huggies, wipe her with baby wipes, and putting baby powder and diaper rash cream on her. Milhouse then says. "Um Maggie! Can you help me put your new huggies on." When all of a sudden Maggie says. "Uh-oh! Milhouse I just peed a little." So Milhouse quickly picks Maggie up and takes her to the toilet. Once Maggie on the toilet she immediately and completely relieves her bladder into the toilet. Once she's done peeing on the toilet. Milhouse helps her wipe herself and wash her hands. Does she want to have a new diaper put on her and her onesie back on, does she want to put a pull up on and one of Lisa's toddler outfits on?
15.title: Just closing the diaper

choices: Milhouse hangs out with Bart
Milhouse continues to take care of Maggie
They hear the upstairs toilet flush and are shocked that it wasn't Milhouse
153.content:
Milhouse says. "Hey Maggie! Your mom told me that you get two baths." Maggie says very cutely. "Is it bath time for me?" Milhouse looks at the clock in the bathroom and says. "Yes it is time for your bath Maggie." So Milhouse get her bath ready. So once her bath is ready Milhouse picks her up and puts her in the bathtub. Maggie says out of complete shock. "Milhouse how did you get the water temperature just right. When everyone else never gets it right." Milhouse then says. "Maggie that's because I bathe myself with the exact same water temperature as your bath." So with that said Milhouse gets started on washing Maggie.

About halfway through her bath Milhouse and Maggie hear Marge returning with Bart and Lisa. Marge says. "Milhouse was Maggie behaving good for you." Milhouse says. "Yes she has been behaving just like Lisa, and I'm almost done giving her a bath." Bart and Lisa are shocked and say. "Milhouse how did you end up babysitting Maggie." Maggie says. "Milhouse came over to hangout with Bart and mom was just about to leave to pick you two up at the plant, and so instead of having to take me with her. Milhouse said that he'd watch me while she goes to pick you two up." What happens next?
153.title: Have Milhouse give her a bath since it's ti...

In Maggie's room is Lisa's old potty and pull ups, and Maggie with a pull up on
Milhouse and Maggie come downstairs with Maggie wearing a pull up
1533.content: Lisa, Marge, and Bart hear the upstairs toilet flush but only Marge says. "Milhouse! Did you use the toilet after Maggie's bath?" They're shocked when Maggie answers back saying very cutely. "Mommy Milhouse didn't flush it silly!" Marge then says. "Omg! Maggie did you just go potty on the toilet like a big girl." Maggie says. "Yes mommy! I went pee pee and poop poo on the toilet, and soon I won't be wearing huggies anymore!" What happens next?
1533.title: They hear the upstairs toilet flush and are sho...

info.brief_description: Milhouse comes over, but finds out that the only ones home are Marge and Maggie
info.description: This story takes place on a day where Homer takes Bart and Lisa to the doctor on the way to work, and since the nuclear power plant is no place for kids to run around inside. Marge has to go and pick them up. When all of a sudden just as she's ready to leave. Milhouse shows up at the door and wants to hangout with Bart.
info.pretty_title: Milhouse is asked to babysit Maggie
